reviews.review_description: Hello, I heard some other people about being moderators? So maybe I can be one. I have always dreamt of being a gorilla tag moderator but it’s just way to hard to get into so I am asking you now. Can I be a moderator please? Thank you

reviews.review_title: Listen, game is very great but…
reviews.review_description: Ok all in all, this game is amazing, but a random mod decided to ban me when I was just in a city lobby buying stuff, am I able to get unbanned?
I love the game in all, but every time I play only up and I fall, it makes me leave the server. But I think it’s better than the actual GT game! Keep up the good work!
I can't connect to a lobby, and when I accidentally get out of the map, it just kicks me out of the game. This game really needs an update, but it's a great game overall.
Best game flux I love your game and it’s me void btw lol but the game is amazing and everyone should get it custom maps nice moderators and good mods definitely should get it!!!

Idk, my friend said that I was a mod because he supposedly said he was a mod, but people are saying that you have to have the stick, but my friend gave me the candy cane and said that was the stick. Reply and make sure if I’m mod or not..

reviews.review_title: Can I be a mod plz?
reviews.review_description: Here's some reason why I think I should be a mod: I follow the code of conduct in gorilla tag, I will never ban someone for fun or kick them, I do what I'm told, I love this game and would love to be a mod, but overall 100000/10 stars! 🤩🥳❤️
Your game is awesome but, sometimes I see mean people and I wanna help by being a moderator it would mean a lot and I will help the community.

Everybody is using mods they don’t get reported so I say ok I can use mods must of been a game mistake 2 seconds later every one reports me and I’m banned never download this 
game
I like this game because you have mods and maps it's so good you should try this

reviews.review_title: This is one of the worst games yet
reviews.review_description: Bc everyone is asking for moder and that type of crap so just stop asking
